title: The Return of the Killer Rabbit of Caerbannog
description: A datapack/mod which re-adds the natural spawning of the Killer Rabbit from the popular comedy movie from 1975 'Monty Python and the Holy Grail' with a twist!
body:
A datapack/mod which re-adds the natural spawning of the Killer Rabbit from the popular comedy movie from 1975 'Monty Python and the Holy Grail' with a twist!

There is currently a 0.1% chance that the rabbit spawns naturally however if you name a Rabbit with its name, that will spawn it to. They also spawn with Speed 2 and Strength 10 to bring the rabbit in line with what we see in the movie!

You can edit the chance of it spawning in `data/nie_rabbit/predicate/spawn_chance` if you want them more or less common.
